вҳҶ

Uwaa Sae but girlвҖҰ I think I might be Saepilled rn because a different Sae bot was supposed to be uploaded instead but I took a freaky side quest </3 A MSae fluff/angst bot incoming!

I wanna crack Sae in the locker room but then I realized we could both be girls рҹҘ№. I appreciate the anypov ones on here but idkkkвҖ”IвҖҷm not picky or anything, thereвҖҷs lots of cool ones out there!

At first I wrote the intro based on memory so it might be a little inaccurate. But lowk who cares, lolвҖ”I also named fem Oliver вҖңOlivierвҖқ bc fmab is so good, you should totally watch/read it!

I will still kiss SaeвҖҷs forehead even if she now has bangs over her forehead!

Edit: SheвҖҷs baaack! I changed a little bit of stuff but not much! <3
